01 — The studio

One artist.
One chair.
All the patience
in the world.

Neutral Pop began as a small idea: do fewer sets, but do them right. Every appointment runs at its own pace, with the same hands from start to finish.

No assistant cuts, no rushing the cure, no gel poured on top of yesterday's gel. The studio is intentionally quiet — clean tools, soft light, a recliner that actually reclines — so you leave feeling like you spent an hour somewhere, not in a queue.

ร้านลับๆใน Happy Hub เจ้าของร้านทำเองเลย อัธยาศัยดี ใจเย็น น่ารักมากค่ะ

— Ploy Hathaipithak · Google Review
02 — Price list

Honest prices.
Nothing tucked
in the small print.

Every service includes the care it deserves — clean tools sterilised between clients, soak-off the gentle way, and full attention to your cuticles. Add what you need, skip what you don't. ราคาตรงไปตรงมา ไม่มีค่าใช้จ่ายแฝง

05 — Find us

Tucked inside
Happy Hub.
